$comment: go: plan which knowledge libraries to retrieve, generate a complete Go source file grounded on them, type-check it (go_build, the oracle), and repair ONCE if it fails. plan -> generate -> build -> done | fix -> rebuild -> done | fail. Bounded, unrolled repair (no cycle) so it lints clean and terminates. plan emits one search query per library (stdlib/patterns/idioms); an empty query is skipped, so only the relevant libraries are consulted (cpp-style plan-routing).
summary: Generate Go code for a focused task, verify it with `go build`, and repair once if it does not build.
